listing_date.description: The date the notice was posted on the PSX portal table (YYYY-MM-DD). Always present.

document_date.description: The formal issuance date printed inside the letter itself (YYYY-MM-DD).

company_name.description: The full legal name of the entity issuing the announcement.

subject.description: The exact subject line text extracted from the document header.

announcement_signals.description: Array of all distinct operational tracking signals present in the text.

is_actionable_signal.description: True if the document establishes immediate future or ongoing restrictions, entitlements, or required actions. False if it merely documents a historical event that already concluded.

time.description: Scheduled time string of the meeting.

start_date.description: Start of book closure or closed period range (YYYY-MM-DD).

end_date.description: End of book closure or closed period range (YYYY-MM-DD).

type.description: Explicit designation of the closure type.

payout_amount.description: The distribution dividend amount or percentage value. Null if not explicitly declared.

currency.description: The currency unit or identifier for the payout distribution (e.g., 'PKR', 'Percent').

payment_due_date.description: The explicit future date the payout cash/payout is distributed (YYYY-MM-DD).

entitlement_record_date.description: The single cutoff date for shareholder register eligibility. Null if multi-tranche or absent.
